examples: Don't forget to close down properly.
The server was closed down for maintenance.
The factory closed down last year.
The company closed down its overseas branch.
The restaurant closed down after 20 years.
Many shops closed down during the pandemic.
Close down the computer before leaving.
She closed down all the programs.
They closed down the business due to losses.
example_translate: Многие магазины закрылись во время пандемии.
close down.synonyms:
Закрывать (бизнес, предприятие) - shut down, close, terminate
Выключать (компьютер, систему) - shut down, turn off, power down
